scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:server
scripts.test:
npm run build && powershell -NoProfile -Command "$node = if ($env:UBOT_NODE) { $env:UBOT_NODE } elseif (Test-Path 'D:\environment
vm\v22.17.0
ode.exe') { 'D:\environment
vm\v22.17.0
ode.exe' } else { 'node' }; & $node --test --experimental-test-isolation=none (Get-ChildItem -Recurse dist -Filter *.test.js | ForEach-Object { $_.FullName })"
